creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm taking this since I committed the update and adding the maintainer to CC.

I did run the updated client before committing the update and am running it right now. It is not segfaulting on me, so I committed it.

To help the maintainer diagnose this you should also state the FreeBSD version you are running.

Unluckily both the core dump and the backtrace you provide are of little use. You should recompile at least owncloudclient (but maybe some used libraries too) with debugging symbols enabled so that we know in which functions the crash actually happened.
